category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Laos.

target_market_label.zh: 老挝（DOSM / 能源矿产部 / EDL）
target_market_label.zht: 寮國（DOSM / 能源礦產部 / EDL）

title.en: China-to-Laos EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入老挝：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入寮國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Laos DOSM conformity requirements, Ministry of Energy and Mines (MEM) and Electricité du Laos (EDL) grid-connection requirements, IEC 61851 safety and EMC standards, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector direction, OCPP interoperability, and the real-world GB/T connector presence driven by Chinese-brand EV penetration via the China-Laos BRI corridor.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与老挝DOSM合格评定要求、能源矿产部（MEM）及老挝电力公司（EDL）并网要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC标准、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口导向、OCPP互操作，以及中国品牌电动汽车通过中老BRI走廊带来的GB/T接口实地存在现状的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與寮國DOSM合格評定要求、能源礦產部（MEM）及寮國電力公司（EDL）併網要求、IEC 61851安全及EMC標準、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口導向、OCPP互操作，以及中國品牌電動汽車通過中寮BRI走廊帶來的GB/T接口實地存在現狀的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Laos, the key practical considerations are: Laos operates on 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz supplied by EDL, which is electrically compatible with China's 220 V / 380 V baseline within standard input-voltage tolerance ranges, but derating at tropical ambient temperatures must be confirmed. DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology) adopts IEC-based standards for conformity, and MEM / EDL govern grid-connection approval and project licensing. Laos' formal connector direction aligns with IEC 62196 (Type 2 AC / CCS2 DC), but the ground reality is that Chinese-brand EVs (BYD, SAIC-MG, and others) entering Laos via the China-Laos Railway and BRI have brought GB/T hardware physically onto Lao roads — creating a genuine mixed-fleet, mixed-connector environment. For formal DOSM/EDL approval and IEC 62196-compatible charging network deployment, GB/T connectors are not interoperable with IEC 62196 Type 2 vehicle inlets. Exporters should: (1) confirm IEC 61851-family safety evidence acceptable to DOSM; (2) clarify which connector type the specific Lao project or site operator requires; (3) confirm EDL grid-connection and metering approval; (4) address OCPP back-office where networked charging is involved. A blanket Laos-wide mandatory EVSE certification regulation through DOSM could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current conformity assessment route with DOSM or a qualified local agent before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入老挝时，关键实务注意事项如下：老挝电网为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，由老挝电力公司（EDL）供电，在标准输入电压容差范围内与中国220 V / 380 V基线电气兼容，但须确认热带环境温度下的热降额设计。老挝标准计量局（DOSM）采用IEC体系标准进行合格评定，能源矿产部（MEM）和EDL负责并网审批和项目许可。老挝正式的接口导向与IEC 62196（交流Type 2 / 直流CCS2）一致，但现实情况是通过中老铁路和BRI进入老挝的中国品牌电动汽车（比亚迪、上汽名爵等）已将GB/T硬件带到老挝道路上——形成真实存在的混合车队、混合接口环境。就正式DOSM/EDL审批和IEC 62196兼容充电网络部署而言，GB/T接口与IEC 62196 Type 2车辆接口不兼容。出口商应：(1) 确认DOSM认可的IEC 61851体系安全证据；(2) 确认具体老挝项目或场地运营商所要求的接口类型；(3) 确认EDL并网及计量审批；(4) 联网充电涉及时处理OCPP后台问题。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认适用于所有EVSE整机的老挝DOSM强制认证规则，出口商在出货前应向DOSM或合格当地代理核实当前合格评定路径。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入寮國時，關鍵實務注意事項如下：寮國電網為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，由寮國電力公司（EDL）供電，在標準輸入電壓容差範圍內與中國220 V / 380 V基線電氣兼容，但須確認熱帶環境溫度下的熱降額設計。寮國標準計量局（DOSM）採用IEC體系標準進行合格評定，能源礦產部（MEM）和EDL負責併網審批和項目許可。寮國正式的接口導向與IEC 62196（交流Type 2 / 直流CCS2）一致，但現實情況是通過中寮鐵路和BRI進入寮國的中國品牌電動汽車（比亞迪、上汽名爵等）已將GB/T硬件帶到寮國道路上——形成真實存在的混合車隊、混合接口環境。就正式DOSM/EDL審批和IEC 62196兼容充電網絡部署而言，GB/T接口與IEC 62196 Type 2車輛接口不兼容。出口商應：(1) 確認DOSM認可的IEC 61851體系安全證據；(2) 確認具體寮國項目或場地運營商所要求的接口類型；(3) 確認EDL併網及計量審批；(4) 聯網充電涉及時處理OCPP後台問題。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認適用於所有EVSE整機的寮國DOSM強制認證規則，出口商在出貨前應向DOSM或合格當地代理核實當前合格評定路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, DOSM scope determination, MEM / EDL approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, network operators, and installers should verify current Laos conformity assessment rules, EDL grid-connection requirements, IEC standard editions, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、DOSM适用范围裁定、能源矿产部 / EDL批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、网络运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行老挝合格评定规则、EDL并网要求、IEC标准版本及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、DOSM適用範圍裁定、能源礦產部 / EDL批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、網絡運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行寮國合格評定規則、EDL併網要求、IEC標準版本及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
